query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orderNo IS NULL OR orderNo = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_orderNo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerName IS NULL OR customerName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_customerName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN salespersonId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_salesperson,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trafficSource IS NULL OR trafficSource = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_trafficSource,
  SUM(CASE WHEN courseAmount IS NULL OR courseAmount = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_courseAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paymentAmount IS NULL OR paymentAmount = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_paymentAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN teacherFee IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_teacherFee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paymentChannel IS NULL OR paymentChannel = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_paymentChannel,
  SUM(CASE WHEN channelOrderNo IS NULL OR channelOrderNo = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_channelOrderNo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN classDate IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_classDate,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deliveryCity IS NULL OR deliveryCity = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_deliveryCity,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deliveryTeacher IS NULL OR deliveryTeacher = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_deliveryTeacher,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deliveryCourse IS NULL OR deliveryCourse = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_deliveryCourse,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status IS NULL OR status = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_status
FROM orders;
